title: Retinted: Vanilla Waters
description:
Retints Waters of Vanilla biomes. (REQUIRES POLYTONE MOD)
Part of the Retinted resource packs series.
body:
Recolors most of Vanilla's water to be a softer blue.
Default vanilla water is very blue, almost purple at times and hard on the eyes.
I think the deep blue suits the frozen biomes, but the rest of the biomes could use a lighter tint.
All overworld biomes **except** non-mountain snowy biomes, swamp biomes and underground biomes have their water changed.

**Check out the Gallery for pictures.**

## _This Resource Pack Requires the Polytone mod to work!_
Polytone is a mod that allows resource pack creators to edit more things than usual, like water colors. I have also heard that Optifine works but I have not tested it.
